# ADR index

A bullet-list index, not a table — a real, common convention (found running R5's
cosmos-sdk/edgex-docs/opendatahub) that a table-only scan misses entirely, silently
treating the whole log as unindexed instead of reading the list that is actually there.

- [ADR 0001: First decision](0001-first-decision.md)
- [ADR 0002: Missing decision](0002-missing-decision.md)
